name: Tireur d'Assaut
description: Fantassin polyvalent armé d'un railgun compact en configuration assaut. Sa doctrine : avancer toujours, jamais reculer.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Assault soldier mid-stride firing a compact railgun, angular crimson armor, sparks flying from barrel, aggressive forward lean.
